title: thelypteris subtetragona
intro: Thelypteris subtetragona, also known as the Mountain Shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Thelypteris subtetragona include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
